name: pre-vibe
description: Codex workflow plugin that turns vague first-session requests into a project-specific intake flow, handbook spec, PROJECT_AGENTS guidance, and first prompt.

interface.shortDescription: Guide rough starts into a clean Codex intake workflow.
interface.longDescription: pre-vibe is a Codex workflow plugin for first-session intake. It helps Codex clarify vague requests, run mandatory safe project and Codex-component indexing, write task-specific artifacts, and inject only a compact first prompt after user approval.
defaultPrompt: Turn my rough idea into a clear Codex-ready task.
Prepare this new session with project-aware context.
Clarify this request before Codex starts work.
